case_title: GORDON HARRIS et al RESPONDENT VS. CATHERINE CANFIELD DBA AUSTIN DESIGN APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MINUTES FOR JUL-24-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
PETITION FOR HEARING FILED BY APPELLANT ORDER SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
PETITION FOR REHEARING DENIED WITH PREJUDICE, JUDGMENT AMENDED.
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT CATHERINE CANFIELD DBA AUSTIN DESIGN AS TO RESPONDENT HARRIS, GORDON ELMAN, JUDI HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2003 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF THURSDAY, 24JUL03 BY PRO TEM JUDGE BRUCE M.LUBARSKY; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525, THURS., 24JUL2003).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HARRIS, GORDON ELMAN, JUDI RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CATHERINE CANFIELD DBA AUSTIN DESIGN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,077.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT; PLAINTIFF ORDERED TO RETURN SUBJECT SOFA TO DEFENDANT, FORTHWITH; CARTAGE, DELIVERY AND FREIGHT CHARGES TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF(S).
JUDGMENT AMENDED TO READ; THE COURT FURTHER ORDER THAT THE SAID SOFA BE DELIVERED NOT LATER THAN 21 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT TO 130 LEWIS RD.
